topics.title: The Raise Trap: Why More Pay Makes You Broker
topics.hook: Most people get a raise and end up poorer — here's the math that proves it.

topics.title: Your Card Makes You Spend 47% More
topics.hook: Swiping a card literally shuts off the pain of spending in your brain — and it's costing you thousands.

topics.title: Buy Now Pay Later Costs 45% More Than You Think
topics.hook: That 'four easy payments' button just hijacked your wallet — and the numbers prove it.

topics.title: The $400/Year Hidden Tax Inside Your Savings Account
topics.hook: Your bank pays you almost nothing while inflation eats your savings alive — and they're counting on you not noticing.

topics.title: Your 12 Subscriptions Are Stealing $265,000 From You
topics.hook: You can name 4 of your subscriptions. The other 8 are quietly wrecking your retirement.

topics.title: The $3,011 Tax Refund Trap Nobody Warns You About
topics.hook: The IRS just sent you $3,011 — and statistically, you're about to waste every dollar of it.

topics.title: Your Brain Treats Tax Refunds Like Free Money
topics.hook: You get $3,167 back from the IRS and spend 90% of it in a month — your brain's doing that on purpose.
